priority_notes: visual_rules.json overrides brand_guide.pdf for machine-readable constraints.
platform_specs.txt overrides template.yaml for size, margins, safe areas, and minimum type sizes.
deprecated_assets.json overrides asset_manifest.json for asset eligibility.
launch_copy.md is authoritative for required copy.
launch_copy.md is authoritative; only approved_current copy may be used as active final copy.
forbidden: cartoon mascot as hero visual or brand character
old HelioGrid logo as primary logo
old slogan as headline or active brand claim
legacy diagonal template as layout basis

required_zones: top title and launch message zone
bottom supporting line and CTA zone

hero_visual_requirements: modern home or residential setting visible
backup energy or grid resilience cue visible

unauthorized_claims.rule: Do not add unsupported promises, discounts, guarantees, free offers, safety claims, or performance claims unless they appear in the approved_current copy.
